firstItem.body: Sign in or create an account and we'll add it to your inventory — nothing is lost.
firstItem.title: Your item is saved

forgot.errorGeneric: Failed to send the reset link. Please try again.
forgot.makeSureCorrect: Make sure you entered the right address
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgot.successFallback: If that email exists in our system, you'll get a reset link shortly.
forgot.title: Forgot password?

invite.errorGeneric: Failed to accept the invite. Please try again.
invite.expiredBody: This invite link has expired. Ask the group admin to generate a new one.
invite.invalidBody: This invite link is not valid or could not be loaded.
invite.usedBody: This invite link has already been used.

layout.tagline: "Everything I own, where I can find it — warranties, values, and all the parts I keep forgetting to order."

login.errorGeneric: Sign-in failed. Please check your details and try again.
login.subtitle: Sign in to your inventory
login.title: Welcome back

magicLink.checkInboxBody: If an account exists for that email, we've sent a sign-in link. The link expires shortly, so use it soon.
magicLink.errorGeneric: Couldn't send the sign-in link. Please try again.
magicLink.expiredBody: This sign-in link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one to continue.
magicLink.verifyingBody: Please wait while we verify your sign-in link.

challenge.backupHint: Backup codes are single-use. Need a new set? Regenerate from Settings after signing in.
challenge.error: Couldn't verify the code. Re-check it and try again.
challenge.subtitle: Enter the code from your authenticator app to finish signing in as {{email}}.
challenge.title: Two-factor authentication
challenge.totpHint: Open your authenticator app to get a fresh six-digit code.

noGroup.createGroupDescription: Set up your own inventory and invite others.
noGroup.description: You don't belong to any inventory group yet. Create one to start tracking your belongings.

teaser.caption: Most users start with 5–20 items. Add yours →

noGroup.title: Welcome to Inventario

connectedAccounts.subtitle: Sign in with linked providers without a password.
connectedAccounts.title: Connected accounts

oauth.errorState: Sign-in failed: state mismatch. Please try again.
oauth.linkRequired: Sign in with your password to link your {{provider}} account to {{email}}.

unlink.confirmBodyWithMethods: Unlinking {{provider}} means you'll need to sign in another way. You currently have: {{methods}}.
unlink.errorGeneric: Failed to unlink the provider. Please try again.
unlink.errorLastMethod: Set a password first or link another provider before unlinking this one.

passwordStrength.hint: Use 8+ characters with letters and numbers.
passwordStrength.label: Password strength

register.autoAcceptError: Registered, but couldn't join the group automatically. Please sign in manually to continue.
register.subtitle: Start tracking your inventory for free
register.successFallback: We've sent you a verification link to confirm your account.
register.termsAccept: I agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
register.title: Create account

reset.errorGeneric: Failed to reset password. The link may have expired.
reset.missingTokenBody: Please request a new password reset link.
reset.signInWithNew: Sign in with your new password
reset.subtitle: Choose a strong password for your account.
reset.successFallback: Your password has been reset. You can now sign in with your new password.
reset.title: Set new password

session.ended: Your session has ended. Please sign in again.
session.expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

setPassword.errorGeneric: Failed to set the password. Please try again.
setPassword.subtitle: Add a password to your account so you can sign in without an external provider.
setPassword.successBody: Sign in again with your new password.
setPassword.title: Set a password

validation.confirmEmailMismatch: The email you entered doesn't match your account email
validation.confirmEmailRequired: Enter your email address to confirm
validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.passwordSameAsCurrent: New password must differ from your current one
validation.termsRequired: You must accept the Terms of Service to continue

verify.expiredBody: This verification link has expired. Links are valid for 24 hours.
verify.invalidBody: This verification link is not valid or has already been used.
verify.missingBody: Please use the link from your verification email.
verify.successFallback: Your email address has been confirmed. You're all set to use Inventario.
